title: Emergency Curfew Proposal
description: A proposal to impose a curfew to stem violent unrest.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Kai: "Curfews reduce violence immediately. Cities used them effectively during 2020 unrest." (Source: AP News, 2020 Curfew Reports)

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Leo: "And they punished innocent people. Freedom shouldn't be suspended so easily."

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Kai: "Freedom means nothing if people are afraid to leave their homes."

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Kai: "Ignoring violence doesn't make you noble — it makes you irresponsible."
